allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('metadata:', JSON.stringify\(j.metadata,null,2\)\); console.log\('course[0]:', JSON.stringify\(j.courses?.[0],null,2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./tmp_api.json'\); console.log\('metadata:', JSON.stringify\(j.metadata,null,2\)\); console.log\('course[0]:', JSON.stringify\(j.courses?.[0],null,2\)\); console.log\('total courses in response:', j.courses?.length\)")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./tmp_search.json'\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(j\)\); console.log\('metadata:', JSON.stringify\(j.metadata\)\); console.log\('first country:', j.courses?.[0]?.location?.country\); console.log\('total:', j.metadata?.total_records\)")
